cit.basis: 18% standard corporate (profit) income tax; reduced 13% rate for producers of goods, under the Tajik Tax Code.
cit.note: Administered by the Tax Committee under the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan. Sector-specific and minimum-tax rules are out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: Standard VAT rate ~14%, being gradually reduced under fiscal reform.

personal_income_tax.note: Employment income taxed at a standard rate (simplified estimate).

official_sources.name: Tax Committee under the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated figures pending verification against official Tax Committee publications; not for filing or production use without local validation.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified AI estimates for LedgerField.
VAT reduction schedule, producer classification, minimum tax, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
